title: Sensing (GSM v1)
description: The microscopic homeostatic verification primitive: links an Actuation to its feedback observation, forming a per-actuation closed-loop between Actuator and Sensor. Only exists for closed-loop actuations (return-value-assignment in Rule body).

actuation.description: Reference to the Actuation observed by this Sensing.

sensor.derivedFrom: Rule body → sys.* return-value-assignment → Sensing derivation

actuationEventArchetype.description: EventArchetype of the ActuationEvent (Actuator → Sensor flow, cybernetic step 4).

actuationSensingEventArchetype.description: EventArchetype of the ActuationSensingEvent (Sensor → Controller flow, cybernetic step 6).

sensingReceptor.description: Controller's Receptor that receives the ActuationSensingEvent, closing the loop.
sensingReceptor.derivedFrom: Rule body → return-value-assignment → Controller sensingReceptor derivation
